zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey Fitz Eustace de Boulogne於1060年出生在法國洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯時，他的父親Eustache II de Boulogne41歲，母親Ide de Lorraine31歲。他和Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

nameMeanings.name: Fitz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

nameMeanings.name: Eustace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French form of the Late Greek names Eustakhios and Eustathios. These were evidently of separate origin, the former derived from eu ‘well, good’ + stakhys ‘grapes’, the latter from eu + stēnai ‘to stand’. However, the tradition is very confused. The name was introduced in this form to Britain by the Normans, among whom it was popular as a result of the fame of St Eustace , a Norman nobleman who was said to have been converted to Christianity by the vision of a crucifix between the antlers of the stag he was hunting.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey Fitz Eustace de Boulogne was born in 1060, in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Eustache II de Boulogne, was 41 and his mother, Ide de Lorraine, was 31. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey Fitz Eustace de Boulogne est né en 1060, à Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Eustache II de Boulogne, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Ide de Lorraine, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey Fitz Eustace de Boulogne 1060 in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eustache II de Boulogne 41 und seine Mutter Ide de Lorraine 31. Er hatte mit Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey Fitz Eustace de Boulogne è nato il nel 1060 nel Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Eustache II de Boulogne, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Ide de Lorraine, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Fitz Eustace de Boulogneが1060年にフランスロレィヌメウゼブラバント-スル-メウゼで生まれた時，父Eustache II de Boulogneは41歳，母Ide de Lorraineは31歳であった。彼はLady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essexとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Fitz Eustace de Boulogne(이)가 1060년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 브라반트-수-우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eustache II de Boulogne(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Ide de Lorraine(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey Fitz Eustace de Boulogne nasceu em 1060, em Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Eustache II de Boulogne, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Ide de Lorraine, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey Fitz Eustace de Boulogne родился в 1060 г. в местности брабант-сур-меус, меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Eustache II de Boulogne было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Ide de Lorraine, 31. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey Fitz Eustace de Boulogne nació en 1060, en Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Eustache II de Boulogne, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Ide de Lorraine, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Lady Beatrice de Mandeville Countess of Essex.
